title: xanthophyllum ovatifolium
intro: Xanthophyllum ovatifolium, also known as the Ovate-leafed Xanthophyllum, is a plant species in the family Polygalaceae. It is a shrub or small tree that is native to tropical forests in Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia, Malaysia, and the Philippines. The leaves and stems of Xanthophyllum ovatifolium are used in traditional medicine to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments. The plant has been found to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, and it is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal benefits.
